deprecation_criterion: when the [rabbit] print convention is replaced by a structured logging facility
description: Defines the [rabbit] print convention used by all rabbit-workflow hooks and CLI scripts for user-visible systemMessage and terminal output.

normal.description: ANSI green — used for informational/success messages on stdout (session-init, policy refresh, skills updated)

alert.description: ANSI red — used for warning/alert messages on stderr (policy drift, scope-guard violations, forced transitions)
